name: Showa Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Showa Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the digital finance business in Japan and internationally. The company offers loans for motorcycles and agricultural equipment. It also produces and sells Japanese sweets, such as rice cakes and dumplings comprises daifuku mocha; and rubber linings, molds, cleaning equipment, food packing, etc. In addition, the company manufactures and sells tennis balls and sportswear, as well as operates tennis clubs. Further, it is involved in the content planning, production, editing, design, wholesale, retail, distribution, and related rights businesses for music, magazines, books, trading card games, web, etc. The company was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Kashiwa, Japan. Showa Holdings Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of A.P.F.Group Co., Ltd.
